title: Innum Enna Thozha Lyrics 7am arivu song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Balram, Naresh Iyer and Suchith Suresan
Lyrics: Pa Vijay

Music: Harris Jeyaraj
Movie: 7am arivu

Innum Enna Thozha, Ethanayo Naala
Nammai Ingu Namey Thozaithomey!!
Nammaal mudiyadha nammaal mudiyaadhaa
Naalai vellum naalai seivome..
Yaarum illai thadai poda
unnai mella idai poda
nambikayil nadai poda sammadhame
enna illai unnodu
yekam enna kannodu
vetri endrum vazhiyodu pirandhidume

Vandhaal alaiyaai varuvom
vilndhaal vidhayaai vilvom
meendum meendum azhuvom, azhuvom
Innum innum iruga
ulle uyirum uruga
ilamai padaye varuga
Aezhuga... (Innum enna thozha)

Manam ninaithaal,adhai dhinam ninaithaal
nenja ninaithadhai mudikalaam,
Thodu vaanam dhinam thodum dhooram
pala kaikalai serkkalaam

Vidhai vidhaithaal nellai vidhai vidhaithaal
adhil kallendrum mulaikumaa
Nam thalaikuraigal nooru kadandhaalum
thanda veerangal marakkumaa

Ore manam ore gunam ore thadam edhirgaalathil
adhe balam adhe dhidam agam puram nam dhegathil

Kalluthoodum oru aayudhathai
Dhinam Kalangalil sumakirom
Aezhuthodum oru aayudhathai
engal mozhiyinil suvvaikirom
pani moottam vandhu panidhenna
sudum pagalavan maraiyuma
andha pagai moottam vandhu paniyaamal
engal iru vizhi uranguma

Idho idho innaindhadho, inam inam nam kaiyodu
Adho adho therindhadho, idam idam nam kannodu

Yaarum illai thadai poda
unnai mella idai poda
nambikayil nadai poda sammadhame
enna illai unnodu
yekam enna kannodu
vetri endrum vazhiyodu pirandhidume

Vandhaal alaiyaai varuvom
vilndhaal vidhayaai vilvom
meendum meendum azhuvom, azhuvom

Innum innum iruga,ulle uyirum uruga
ilamai padaye varuga, Aezhuga...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Innum Enna Thozha?

The song is a motivational anthem that encourages perseverance and overcoming obstacles.

Who composed the music for 7am Arivu?

The music for the movie was composed by Harris Jeyaraj.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song underscores pivotal moments of determination and resilience in the film's narrative.

Who are the singers of Innum Enna Thozha?

The song is sung by Balram, Naresh Iyer, and Suchith Suresan.

When was 7am Arivu released?

The movie was released in the year 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Innum Enna Thozha is a motivational song from the movie 7am Arivu, composed by Harris Jeyaraj with lyrics by Pa Vijay. The song is performed by Balram, Naresh Iyer, and Suchith Suresan, and it serves as an anthem of resilience and determination. It captures the essence of overcoming challenges and inspires listeners to keep striving for success. The energetic composition and powerful lyrics make it a perfect fit for moments of motivation and celebration in the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Innum Enna Thozha from the movie 7am Arivu is a powerful anthem of motivation and triumph. With the dynamic voices of Balram, Naresh Iyer, and Suchith Suresan, paired with Harris Jeyaraj's invigorating composition, this song inspires listeners to overcome challenges. Experience the synergy of uplifting lyrics by Pa Vijay and a compelling musical arrangement that drives the spirit of perseverance.
stanzaMeanings: What more, friend? For so many days, we have been losing here! What we can't do today, we will do tomorrow. No one can stop you, just walk with confidence. Do you agree? Why feel sad? Victory will always be born with you.
If we come, we will come like a wave. If we fall, we will rise like a seed. We will cry again and again. Come closer, let life melt, let the young army rise. Rise up... (What more, friend?)
If the mind thinks, if it thinks daily, we can achieve what the heart desires. Touch the sky, daily touch the distance, we can join many hands.
If you plant a seed, if you plant a grain, will a stone grow from it? Even if we cross a hundred obstacles, will we forget the courage given?
One mind, one character, one path, in the future, the same strength, the same determination, inside and outside our body.
We carry a weapon on our shoulders daily. We write with a weapon in our language. When the cold comes, will it freeze? Will the sun hide? When the enemy comes, will we sleep without fighting?
Here, here, we join together, hand in hand. There, there, we see, place to place, with our eyes.
No one can stop you, just walk with confidence. Do you agree? Why feel sad? Victory will always be born with you.
If we come, we will come like a wave. If we fall, we will rise like a seed. We will cry again and again.
Come closer, let life melt, let the young army rise. Rise up...
